title: Library
content_html:
Library

  • Library is a Docs Viewer page on the public-facing site but it is a distinct data domain from Catalogue
  • Library administration is split across owning Studio and Docs Viewer surfaces rather than a standalone Studio Library dashboard.
  • Library Documents lists generated Library document records for review.
  • Data import/export for Library records uses /studio/data-sharing/review/?scope=library and /studio/data-sharing/prepare/?scope=library.

Dependencies

  • shared Studio navigation from Studio Runtime
  • any shared write-service or activity conventions used across Studio domains
